Module 2: The Artist's Path
!
Executive Summary
• 	A lot of artists use PLF for their businesses and there are many success
stories. When Hollywood releases a film they use the exact same launch
formula.
• 	The difference for artists is that you’re not using the P.S. Path - you’re
not really defining a problem and solving it. Instead, you want to tell the
story of the work and foreshadow it.
• 	This is why you always want to be building the list so you can use it
foreshadow the work. Social media is important for most artists, if not as
important as the email list.
!
How to Implement the Artist’s Path
• 	Introduce the “artist’s hero’s journey”
• 	People love the behind-the-scenes insider view
• 	If you use this leading up to a launch it works great
• 	Revelation of Self
• 	As an artist, people assume you have a romantic story
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 2 --

• 	Release this story, especially in regards to your work
• 	Engage your Tribe
• 	It’s easier for artists - people feel an attachment to your work
• 	Make people feel connected and they will get behind it
• 	Not necessary to have three pieces of prelaunch content
• 	What matters more is the story and giving people insight into your
work
!
